description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline for a Windows environment that runs a NuGet restore before each job and executes MSTest in the test stage. Use a before_script step that runs "C:\\Nuget\\nuget.exe restore MVCApp.sln". Define stages "build" and "test". Add a job named "job" in the "test" stage that runs the command "\"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Visual Studio 14.0\\Common7\\IDE\\MSTest.exe\" \"/testcontainer:\\"C:\\POC-Work\\MVCApp\\MVCApp.Tests\\bin\\Debug\\MVCApp.Tests.dll\\\"\"". No Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
